name: per-GPU mean power
note: M100 reference from Antici et al. 2023 PM100, https://doi.org/10.1145/3624062.3624277. V100 cells run at low-power probe regime (121 W/GPU best-efficiency cell, vs M100 production median 237 W/GPU). This is expected for E1 cells at 150 W power-cap; to land in-band, repeat E1 with pcaps ≥ 250 W or pick the worst-efficiency cell instead of best-efficiency.

name: AR(4) MAE on multi-phase
note: M100-side AR(4) requires separate replay run with predictor instrumentation (Carastan-Santos et al. 2025 protocol)

name: Per-workload CO₂ reduction (M100, country=IT)
note: Net CO₂ axis only valid if E7 passed (FFR validity gate)

name: Scaling envelope @ 980-node scale
note: M100 reference is the Borghesi 2023 published peak facility power (~1 MW for the IT side; full system peak is higher)
